class.name: modbus_ros2_control/ModbusHardware
class.description: Modbus ROS2 Control Hardware Interface Supports multiple Modbus-based end effectors (grippers, etc.) with different protocols. Currently supports: Changingtek gripper

class.name: modbus_ros2_control/DexterousHandHardware
class.description: Modbus ROS2 Control Hardware Interface for Dexterous Hand Supports O7 mechanical hand via Modbus RTU protocol. Modbus ID: Right hand 0x27, Left hand 0x28 Baudrate: 115200 (fixed) Function codes: 04 (read), 16 (write)

class.name: modbus_ros2_control/FreedomRS485Hardware
class.description: ROS2 Control Hardware Interface for Freedom dexterous hand over its custom RS485 protocol. Defaults: /dev/ttyUSB0, slave ID 1, baudrate 115200, 8N1. Commands: 0x10 motion control, 0xF1 angle query.

class.name: modbus_ros2_control/InspireHandHardware
class.description: ROS2 Control Hardware Interface for Inspire RH56 series dexterous hand over standard Modbus RTU. Defaults: /dev/ttyUSB0, slave ID 1, baudrate 115200, 8N1. Function codes: 03 (read holding registers), 10 (write multiple registers).

class.name: modbus_ros2_control/XHand1RS485Hardware
class.description: ROS2 Control Hardware Interface for XHAND1 over its custom RS485 protocol. Defaults: /dev/ttyUSB0, hand ID 0, host ID 0xFE, baudrate 3000000, 8N1. Commands: 0x02 realtime 12-joint position control and feedback.
